title: Tunisian Cornmeal Scones
description: Warm and comforting scones infused with the flavors of Tunisia, perfect for a cozy breakfast or snack.
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Roll out the pastry to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
In a bowl, mix together the cornmeal, salt, sugar, and chopped parsley.
Roll the pastry into a circle and place it on the prepared baking sheet.
Spread the cornmeal mixture evenly over the pastry, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Drizzle the olive oil over the cornmeal mixture.
Fold the edges of the pastry up over the filling, pressing gently to seal.
Brush the pastry with the water.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the filling is set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
